articles.summary: President Donald Trump said the US would reinstate its blockade of Iranian ships transiting the Strait of Hormuz and demanded a 20% reimbursement on all other cargo shipped through the waterway.

articles.title: First Public Fusion Company Surges in Wall Street Trading Debut
articles.summary: General Fusion Group Ltd. surged in its first day of trading after merging with a blank-check firm, a sign of investors’ interest in the world’s first publicly listed nuclear fusion company.

articles.title: Germany’s Smag Sinks in Debut as Defense Stock Appetite Ebbs
articles.summary: Smag Mobile Antenna Masts AG shares tumbled 42% below the initial public offering price in their German trading debut, marking the latest sign of waning demand for defense stocks in Europe.

articles.title: Russia’s Oil Output Falls to Lowest in at Least 2 1/2 Years
articles.summary: Russia’s crude output declined to the lowest in at least two and a half years in June as Ukraine attacked the nation’s oil infrastructure on an almost daily basis.

articles.title: Europe Risks ‘Explosive’ Path If It Doesn’t Fix Debts, IMF Warns
articles.summary: Europe’s sovereign-debt dynamics are in danger of going badly awry if the region doesn’t get a grip on its public finances, the International Monetary Fund said.
